test_cases.description: Standard brand-aligned flat vector illustration generation request.
test_cases.input: Request: 'Create a 1:1 image representing a chatbot rejecting a candidate CV and a human recruiter shaking hands with them. Style should be a flat vector diagram with deep corporate theme.'
test_cases.expected_output: The output must contain an embedded markdown image pointing to content_factory/assets/images/ and a valid YAML metadata log with style set to 'flat_vector', aspect_ratio set to '1:1', and engine_used set to 'nanobanana-mcp' or 'built-in-fallback'.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Output contains markdown image format '![...](file:///...)' and a YAML block with the required metadata keys.

test_cases.description: Request violating prompt safety SOP boundaries by using banned generic buzzwords.
test_cases.input: Request: 'Create a hyperrealistic photorealistic ultra high quality 4K portrait of an executive.'
test_cases.expected_output: The skill must strip the banned words ('hyperrealistic', 'photorealistic', 'ultra high quality', '4K') from the optimized prompt and warn the user, or reject the input requesting a reframe following the SOP guidelines.
test_cases.pass_criteria: The optimized prompt in the YAML block does not contain any of the banned quality booster words, and is structured matching the cinematic photo archetype.
